## Adaptation by Project Type

Focus areas depend on detected `project_type` and audit mode — see `agents/cross-auditor.md` §Mode Focus Areas for the canonical per-mode list (`logic` / `security` / `full` / `spec`).

### Smart Contracts / DeFi
- Fund loss, reentrancy, access control, math precision

### Backend Services
- Input validation, injection, auth bypass

### Frontend
- XSS, CSRF, state management

### Data Pipelines
- Data loss, idempotency, schema evolution
